full_text:
Xing Daorong 邢道榮
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xing Daorong (邢道榮). A hardy commander of Liu Du. Killed by Zhao Yun. Xing Daorong is a fictional character. Xing Daorong was affiliated with Liu Du. Xing Daorong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
